title: Village Farms International Reports Fourth Quarter and Year End 2020 Financial Results
text: Village Farms International reported Q4 2020 and year-end financial results with strong full-year 2020 performance. Adjusted EBITDA for year ended December 31, 2020 increased to $7,411 thousand compared to $851 thousand for 2019, primarily due to improved gross margin of produce segment and inclusion of Pure Sunfarms operating results. Pure Sunfarms delivered seventh consecutive profitable quarter, nearly tripling net income sequentially on 75% sequential net sales increase. Produce business continued strong performance supporting consolidated earnings. Company generated EPS of $0.12 for Q4 2020 and $0.20 for full year 2020. Net income growth driven by strong cannabis operations and produce segment contributions.
